title: ITALY enforcement action against Flamel S.r.l. (15,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 15,000 on Flamel S.r.l. The controller had been active in direct marketing activities involving robocalls followed up with telesales. Although Flamel S.r.l. had been a controller in substance, it acted as a data processor.
